name: DIABETIC (FIBROUS) MASTOPATHY

demographics.Histo: stromal sclerosis with an increased number of spindle cells, scattered epithelial cells
demographics.Age: young woman, 20 years after onset of diabetes

dominant_finding: single / multiple bilateral masses hypoechoic to SQ fat
distribution: single / multiple bilateral masses hypoechoic to SQ fat
discriminating_features: nonspecific discrete mass / regional asymmetry of dense tissue
single / multiple bilateral masses hypoechoic to SQ fat
hypovascular / avascular on color flow imaging
